questions.question: Who snapped in Marvel's movie Infinity War?
In 2018 what was the most disliked video on YouTube?
As of 2020, what song by Ed Sheeran held the Guinness World Record for the most streamed song of all time?
What extremist group became infamous after a series of online videos, leading al-Qaeda to distance itself from them for being "too extreme"?
"Weird flex, but okay" was a phrase used in reply to what kind of statement?
questions.answer: Boasts or brags that most people would find either awkward, irrelevant, or just plain weird
